message:
🐛 fix: Cluster Info Card click targets and GPU flicker (#8597) (#8599)

- Remove hover:text-foreground from server URL and user lines so they
  no longer appear as separate clickable links (they are display-only)
- Add cursor-default to stats grid and footer areas so the pointer hand
  only appears on the clickable card header
- Retain last non-empty GPU data via useRef so the "GPUs by Type"
  section stays visible during background refetch instead of flickering
  in and out every polling cycle

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
